chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 219 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Office objection-as Flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.07.2025. Miss Mehran, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh ------------ Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed for protection allegedly caused by the official Respondent No.01. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh, present in court in connection with some other matters, waives the notice of this petition and submits that police officials are bound to provide protection to the petitioner as and when required to him. In view of the statement given by learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh, learned Counsel for the Petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition, however, she requests disposal which is disposed of with directions to the official Respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide due protection to the petitioner. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
